title: Immersive TFC (Frozen)
description: Modpack which includes and integrates TFC, Immersive Engineering, Immersive Aircrafts and etc.
body:
Modpack is frozen(for now). Check my new modpack Create: Space Travel on Discord:https://discord.gg/xnhpuBaB
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Immersive TFC](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e72366671084332e9700d51eb51203bb018c309.png)

From the Stone Age to the Steel Skies — Forge your path in an expanded, cohesive, and challenging world.

**Overview:**
Immersive TFC is a meticulously crafted survival and progression-focused modpack that seamlessly blends the brutal realism of TerraFirmaCraft (TFC) with the deep industrial engineering of Immersive Engineering and the rewarding exploration enabled by Immersive Aircrafts. This is not a simple kitchen-sink pack; it's an integrated experience where technology evolves naturally from the ground up, and every advancement feels earned.

**The Core Vision:**
The pack completely overhauls the early and mid-game Minecraft experience. You start with TFC's realistic geology, metallurgy, and survival mechanics — knapping your first tools, building a bloomery for wrought iron, and mastering agriculture. This foundational struggle makes the eventual transition into industrial power profoundly satisfying.

**Key Integrated Mods & Features:**

**TerraFirmaCraft:** The unchallenged king of the early game. Defines your start with its detailed world generation, layered rock system, realistic metalworking (smelting, alloying, blacksmithing), and a thirst and nutrition system that matters.
**Immersive Engineering:** The logical and aesthetic successor to TFC's metallurgy. Once you master steel, you graduate to IE's dieselpunk machinery. Build multiblock crushers, fermenters, and arc furnaces. Automate with conveyors and powerful wired electricity. Its industrial aesthetic perfectly complements the hand-crafted feel of TFC.
**Immersive Aircrafts:** Your reward for reaching the industrial age. Exploration is now redefined. Build custom biplanes, helicopters, and airships from IE's steel and components to conquer vast TFC landscapes and discover rare resources. Travel becomes strategic and thrilling.
Supporting Cast for a Cohesive World:

**Create:** Just additional mod with cuted features. Adds unparalleled kinetic automation and detailed craftsmanship, fitting perfectly between TFC's mechanics and IE's industry.
**Farmer's Delight:** Expands TFC's food system with more crops, cooking pots, and meals, making the nutrition system diverse and engaging.
**Supplementaries:** For detailed and functional decoration that matches the pack's aesthetic.
Performance & Atmosphere: Sodium / Iris ensure the world is beautiful, immersive, and runs smoothly.
**What Makes This Pack Unique?**

**Seamless Progression:** Recipes are customized (via Datapack(for now, later will be moved to KubeJS)) to create a unified tech tree. IE machines require TFC-style anvil work; aircraft frames need specific treated woods and steel plates. Nothing feels out of place.

**Exploration-Driven:** TFC's world generation creates vast, unique landscapes. Immersive Aircrafts doesn't just add travel—it makes it essential to find different ores, biomes, and hidden structures scattered across continents.

**Balance & Challenge:** The pack is carefully tuned to avoid skipping stages. You can't magic away ores; you must process them. Power generation requires thought and infrastructure. The journey from a pit kiln to a flying machine is long, challenging, and incredibly rewarding.

**For Players Who Want:**

A long-term, goal-oriented survival world.
The satisfaction of realistic progression and meaningful automation.
A world that demands and rewards exploration.
A cohesive "feel" where all mods serve a unified vision, not just a collection of features.
Begin your journey. Master the earth, harness industry, and take to the skies.
**Also, join our Discord server to track procces of development:** https://discord.gg/xnhpuBaB


</details>
